name: David Robertson
headline: AI Consultant | AI Architect | Applied AI Systems Builder
summary: David Robertson is a senior AI consultant and systems builder focused on applied AI, full-stack product development, architecture, and workflow automation. He is strongest where product thinking, engineering delivery, and AI systems design overlap.
availability_summary: Open to senior AI, architecture, and product engineering roles, particularly where applied AI, systems design, and end-to-end delivery overlap.
contact_cta: If you'd like to discuss a project, the best next step is to share a short outline of the scope, timeline, and goals through the contact form.
stack_highlight: Python backend + Next.js frontend for fast, production-ready delivery

engagement_options.description: 1–5 day engagements to build or validate a specific feature or workflow
End-to-end delivery of a small platform or product using Python and Next.js
Architecture and implementation of applied AI workflows and pipelines
Senior guidance on architecture, product direction, AI workflows, and delivery strategy

custom_services.name: Short project
custom_services.description: 1–5 day focused engagements to build, validate, or unblock a specific feature, workflow, or AI capability.

custom_services.name: MVP build
custom_services.description: End-to-end delivery of a small platform or product using Python and Next.js, with applied AI where needed.

custom_services.name: AI system design
custom_services.description: Architecture and implementation of applied AI workflows, pipelines, evaluation layers, and supporting systems.

custom_services.name: Technical advisory
custom_services.description: Senior guidance on architecture, product direction, AI workflows, delivery strategy, and technical trade-offs.

pricing_notes: Rates vary depending on scope, urgency, complexity, and whether the work is advisory, build-led, or end-to-end delivery.
